because.text: Zero-relay cycle: brief (briefs/BRIEF-governance-go.md) -> codex exec on isolated clone (110k tokens, single shot) -> maintainer cold verification on the clone BEFORE merge: all five acceptance surfaces green, only brief-permitted paths touched, 'Deviations: None' checked against the diff and holds. Codex reused the battle-tested jcs() canonicalizer from the federation code and implemented the s3 pipeline independently (closure fixpoint, lineage walk, quorum-scoped key-state, rival freeze). The 7 adversarial mutations from the brief all delivered. With pinned vectors (obligation 2) and this second implementation (obligation 3), GOV-anchors.md meets its stated preconditions for leaving DRAFT; status change deferred to a future release decision. Lesson upheld from the twin's log: diff HANDOFF coverage against the brief - this time 13/13.

subject.note: codex zero-relay: Go GOV verifier (gov-replay 16/16 + differential 23/23) - GOV conformance obligations 2+3 met
